headline: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of The Cigna Group and Its Subsidiaries
summary: OLDWICK, N.J., March 04, 2026--AM Best has affirmed the Financial Strength Rating (FSR) of A (Excellent) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Ratings (Long-Term ICR) of "a+" (Excellent) of the key U.S. life/health subsidiaries and Europe-based insurance companies of The Cigna Group (Cigna) (headquartered in Bloomfield, CT) [NYSE: CI]. The majority of Cigna’s core U.S. health insurance entities are collectively referred to as Cigna Life & Health Group.

headline: From 1792 to today: Cigna Group CEO David Cordani on building the future of American health
summary: Cigna Group CEO David Cordani reflects on the company's deep roots dating back to 1792 and its evolution into a global health services leader.

headline: Cigna CEO Succession Puts Evernorth And PBM Priorities In Focus
summary: Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) has announced a CEO succession plan. President and COO Brian Evanko will succeed David Cordani as CEO. Cordani will become executive chair of the Board effective July 1, 2026. Cigna Group, trading at $283.93, is one of the larger names in US health insurance and health services. The stock shows mixed recent performance, with a 1.0% return over the past week, 3.6% over the past month, and 30.6% over five years, alongside a 6.2% decline over the past year. This...
